concept: Peacemaker / One Who Embodies Grounded Peace
description: A person who actively brings about peace by their presence and actions. They work to end conflict, soothe tensions, and restore harmony within the community.
rationale: A composition of the established word 'shea' (peace) and the root 'ma' (grounded presence). The word's structure literally means 'one who brings a grounded presence of peace,' defining a peacemaker by their ability to embody and manifest peace in a tangible way.
